---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the HERO Combat Engine
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
Describe the problem or limitation you've encountered. Ex. "I wish I could..." or "It's frustrating when...".

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
Have you thought about other ways to solve this problem? What are the trade-offs?

## Use Case
Explain the use case and why this feature would be valuable for HERO System combat or Foundry VTT users.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
